feed.title: Google Cloud: Cloud Domains
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Cloud Domains

entry.content: Organization Policy Service custom constraints are generally available for Cloud Domains. For more information, see Use custom organization policies.
entry.summary: Organization Policy Service custom constraints are now generally available for Cloud Domains. This feature allows for more granular control over your domain resources. You can learn more about how to use custom organization policies in our documentation.
entry.title: Feature: Custom Organization Policies Now Available for Cloud Domains
